question: Big Bash League: Melbourne Renegades vs Perth Scorchers (Game 1) - Most Sixes Perth Scorchers Winner
description:
This market refers to which team hits the greater number of sixes in the cricket match between Melbourne Renegades and Perth Scorchers scheduled for 2026-01-15 in Big Bash League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Melbourne Renegades will be considered correct if Melbourne Renegades is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Perth Scorchers.The outcome corresponding to Perth Scorchers will be considered correct if Perth Scorchers is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Melbourne Renegades.
If both teams record the same number of sixes, the market will resolve to "Draw".
The market will resolve according to the team that hits the greater number of sixes in the match regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions)/
Only sixes scored from the bat (off any delivery- legal or not) will count towards the total sixes. Overthrows and extras do not count. Sixes scored in a super over do not count.
In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Big Bash League: Melbourne Renegades vs Perth Scorchers (Game 1) - Team Top Batter Melbourne Renegades Winner
description:
This market refers to which team's player records the highest individual run total in the cricket match between Melbourne Renegades and Perth Scorchers scheduled for 2026-01-15 in Big Bash League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Melbourne Renegades will be considered correct if the highest individual score in the match is recorded exclusively by a player from Melbourne Renegades.
The outcome corresponding to Perth Scorchers will be considered correct if the highest individual score is recorded exclusively by a player from Perth Scorchers.
If the highest individual score is shared by at least one player from each team, the market will resolve to Draw.
The market will resolve according to which team's player records the highest individual run total regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions).
DLS/DRS adjustments and any other on-field rulings affecting batting statistics are treated as ordinary data.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official batting statistics being recorded, the market will resolve Draw.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: SA20: Pretoria Capitals vs Paarl Royals (Game 1)
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Pretoria Capitals and Paarl Royals scheduled for January 15 2026 in SA20.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50

question: SA20: Pretoria Capitals vs Paarl Royals (Game 1) - Toss Match Double Pretoria Capitals Winner
description:
This market refers to the combination of the pre-match coin toss and the final match result for the cricket match between Pretoria Capitals and Paarl Royals scheduled for 2026-01-15 in SA20.
This market resolves according to (1) the official toss result and (2) the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Pretoria Capitals will be considered correct if  Pretoria Capitals is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
The outcome corresponding to Paarl Royals will be considered correct if Paarl Royals is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
In all other cases - including where the toss and match winners differ, or where no match winner is recorded - the market will resolve to Neither.
DLS/DRS adjustments, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, Super Over, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a match winner are treated as ordinary wins. If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the tiebreak winner will be considered the match winner for this market. If the match ends tied with no tiebreak used or available, no team will be considered to have won the match and the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without an official match winner being declared, the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and will then resolve as described above.

description:

This market refers to which team's player records the highest individual run total in the cricket match between Durbar Rajshahi and Sylhet Strikers scheduled for 2026-01-15 in BPL T20.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Durbar Rajshahi will be considered correct if the highest individual score in the match is recorded exclusively by a player from Durbar Rajshahi.
The outcome corresponding to Sylhet Strikers will be considered correct if the highest individual score is recorded exclusively by a player from Sylhet Strikers.
If the highest individual score is shared by at least one player from each team, the market will resolve to Draw.
The market will resolve according to which team's player records the highest individual run total regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions).
DLS/DRS adjustments and any other on-field rulings affecting batting statistics are treated as ordinary data.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official batting statistics being recorded, the market will resolve Draw.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: BPL: Chattogram Challengers vs Noakhali (Game 1)
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between Chattogram Challengers and Noakhali scheduled for January 15 2026 in BPL.

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.

If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50

question: BPL: Chattogram Challengers vs Noakhali (Game 1) - Toss Match Double Chattogram Challengers Winner
description:
This market refers to the combination of the pre-match coin toss and the final match result for the cricket match between Chattogram Challengers and Noakhali scheduled for 2026-01-15 in BPL T20.
This market resolves according to (1) the official toss result and (2) the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Chattogram Challengers will be considered correct if  Chattogram Challengers is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
The outcome corresponding to Noakhali will be considered correct if Noakhali is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
In all other cases - including where the toss and match winners differ, or where no match winner is recorded - the market will resolve to Neither.
DLS/DRS adjustments, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, Super Over, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a match winner are treated as ordinary wins. If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the tiebreak winner will be considered the match winner for this market. If the match ends tied with no tiebreak used or available, no team will be considered to have won the match and the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without an official match winner being declared, the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and will then resolve as described above.

question: BPL: Chattogram Challengers vs Noakhali (Game 1) - Most Sixes Chattogram Challengers Winner
description:
This market refers to which team hits the greater number of sixes in the cricket match between Chattogram Challengers and Noakhali scheduled for 2026-01-15 in BPL T20.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Chattogram Challengers will be considered correct if Chattogram Challengers is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Noakhali.The outcome corresponding to Noakhali will be considered correct if Noakhali is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Chattogram Challengers.
If both teams record the same number of sixes, the market will resolve to "Draw".
The market will resolve according to the team that hits the greater number of sixes in the match regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions)/
Only sixes scored from the bat (off any delivery- legal or not) will count towards the total sixes. Overthrows and extras do not count. Sixes scored in a super over do not count.
In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 11, 2AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Set Handicap: Eala (-1.5) vs Wang (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Alexandra Eala and Xinyu Wang in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 9 2026.
This market will resolve to "Eala" if Alexandra Eala wins by 2 or more sets than Xinyu Wang, based on the final completed score. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Wang."
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.
groupItemTitle: ASB Classic: Alexandra Eala vs Xinyu Wang Set Handicap +/-1.5

events.title: ASB Classic: Alexandra Eala vs Xinyu Wang
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Alexandra Eala and Xinyu Wang in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 9 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Eala' if Alexandra Eala advances against Xinyu Wang.

This market will resolve to 'Wang' if Xinyu Wang advances against Alexandra Eala.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Thunder vs. Grizzlies: O/U 228.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 9 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Thunder and Grizzlies combine to score 229 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 229, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Thunder vs. Grizzlies
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 9 at 8:00PM ET:
If the Thunder win, the market will resolve to "Thunder".
If the Grizzlies win, the market will resolve to "Grizzlies".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

description:

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 11, 5AM ET
description:

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be 2°C or below on January 11?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 11 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 11, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: ASB Classic, Qualification: Adrian Mannarino vs Pablo Carreno Busta
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Adrian Mannarino and Pablo Carreno Busta in the ASB Classic, Qualification, scheduled for January 9 at 6:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Mannarino' if Adrian Mannarino advances against Pablo Carreno Busta.

This market will resolve to 'Busta' if Pablo Carreno Busta advances against Adrian Mannarino.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will the highest temperature in Seoul be -7°C or below on January 11?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Incheon Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 11 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Incheon Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/kr/incheon/RKSI.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

events.title: Highest temperature in Seoul on January 11?

question: Hobart International, Qualification: Gabriella Da Silva Fick vs Sara Bejlek
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Gabriella Da Silva Fick and Sara Bejlek in the Hobart International, Qualification, scheduled for January 9 at 8:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Fick' if Gabriella Da Silva Fick advances against Sara Bejlek.

This market will resolve to 'Bejlek' if Sara Bejlek advances against Gabriella Da Silva Fick.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Clippers vs. Nets: O/U 215.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 9 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Clippers and Nets combine to score 216 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 216, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Clippers vs. Nets
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 9 at 7:30PM ET:
If the Clippers win, the market will resolve to "Clippers".
If the Nets win, the market will resolve to "Nets".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

description:

question: XRP Up or Down - January 11, 7AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Musetti vs. Rublev: Set 1 Games O/U 8.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Lorenzo Musetti and Andrey Rublev in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, scheduled for January 10 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 9. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP results.
groupItemTitle: Hong Kong Tennis Open: Lorenzo Musetti vs Andrey Rublev Set 1 O/U 8.5

events.title: Hong Kong Tennis Open: Lorenzo Musetti vs Andrey Rublev
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Lorenzo Musetti and Andrey Rublev in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, scheduled for January 10 at 2:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Musetti' if Lorenzo Musetti advances against Andrey Rublev.

This market will resolve to 'Rublev' if Andrey Rublev advances against Lorenzo Musetti.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Musetti vs. Rublev: Total Sets O/U 2.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Lorenzo Musetti and Andrey Rublev in the Hong Kong Tennis Open, scheduled for January 10 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official ATP statistics.
